pom.xml.general_idea: Change the target Java release version from 17 to 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project is migrating to JDK 21; compiling with release 17 would not enforce JDK 21 API usage or bytecode compatibility.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Quarkus platform version to a release compatible with JDK 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Quarkus versions may not support JDK 21 runtime or compilation features.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace deprecated RESTEasy Reactive Jackson extension with the new REST Jackson extension.
pom.xml.why_exists: The artifact 'quarkus-resteasy-reactive-jackson' is removed or deprecated in newer Quarkus versions; using it causes dependency resolution failure or runtime errors.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update native build configuration to use new Quarkus property names.
pom.xml.why_exists: The property 'quarkus.package.type' is deprecated/removed in newer Quarkus versions; using it may cause build warnings or failures.
